source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/5. [A1417MCW, F1417MCW] (Wireless) EMC Test report.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea EMC test report NK-22-E-0812 for H&abyz F1417MCW digital flat panel X-ray detector, with A1417MCW identified as a variant model.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory EMC evidence for radio equipment under EN 301 489-1, EN 301 489-3, and EN 301 489-17, including radiated emissions, electrostatic discharge, and RF electromagnetic field immunity results.
keyPoints: Product is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model F1417MCW, variant model A1417MCW, trade mark H&abyz.
The test was conducted with the F1417MCW model under 2.4 GHz WiFi and 5 GHz WiFi conditions.
The report states that the equipment under test complies to all requirements of the applied test standards.
Radiated emission below 1 GHz and above 1 GHz, electrostatic discharge, and RF electromagnetic field tests are marked Pass.
No recorded deviations to the applied standards are reported.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is not named as a specific notified body or regulator; the report references Competent Authorities in Europe and EU directives through harmonised standards.
Attachment 1 includes one 5 GHz WiFi below-1 GHz radiated emission test timestamp of 6/16/2022, which is earlier than the stated test period of September 29, 2022 to October 03, 2022.
The report identifies A1417MCW as a variant model, but the model distinction table states N/A for technical deviations from reference model.
